column1: Is your native town located _____ Moscow and St. Petersburg?
A professor recently came _____ an unknown poem by Shakespeare while he was looking through an old book.
He has had a bad day-in addition _____ being late for school he forgot his homework.
One of the main disadvantages _____ the old machine was that it used up so much electricity.
I really need your help, so don't let me _____ , please.
The common people of England had to struggle _____ their rights.
Their friendship ended _____ the quarrel they had last month.
It's supposed to be a clear and beautiful evening tonight. We don't need a tent. We can just sleep _____ the stars.
Don't worry. I have forgiven you for not showing up for dinner. It is water _____ the bridge.
That photograph is really _____ of focus. It's really blurry and I can't tell who is in the picture.
